title: stelis fragilis
intro: Stelis fragilis is a species of orchid native to Mexico, characterized by its small size and delicate white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Stelis fragilis has been reported to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues and reducing fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer its medicinal properties and health benefits.
